basic_info.name: EDIDA - ELLE DECO INTERNATIONAL DESIGN AWARDS
basic_info.description: EDIDA or the ELLE DECO INTERNATIONAL DESIGN AWARDS is a unique international event launched in 2002 where the 25 editors in chief of the ELLE DECORATION network award global excellence in design in 13 categories.
